⚔️ Activities
Battle, train, work & quest — earn coins and XP every day
💰 COINS ✅ Ready
🧵
Work
"The cosplay won't sew itself, senpai."
Help Marin stitch cosplay, tutor the Nakano quintuplets, or hustle an anime part-time shift. Tap glowing points before they fade!
💰 75–200 🪙 ⭐ 8–20 XP
⭐ XP ✅ Ready
⚡
Train
"Beyond your limits lies the power you were always meant to wield."
Practice Water Breathing, focus cursed energy under Gojo, or master chakra with Kakashi. Hit the sweet spot on the timing ring!
💰 12–30 🪙 ⭐ 75–200 XP
🗺️ ADVENTURE ✅ Ready
🗺️
Quest
"Every tile hides a fate — brave adventurer, will you flip them all?"
Explore dungeon tiles as Kazuma, Tanjiro, or Bell Cranel. Flip tiles to find treasure, fight monsters, and dodge traps!
💰 50–160 🪙 ⭐ 38–120 XP
⚔️ BATTLE ✅ Ready
⚔️
Battle
SR UR 👑 Higher rarity = tougher foes & bosses
"The strongest don't just train — they prove it in blood and fire."
Send your card to fight an AI opponent. Higher-rarity cards attract deadlier enemies — even fearsome boss encounters! Win to claim coins and XP.
💰 40–300 🪙 ⭐ 50–250 XP 👑 Boss Chance

🏮 Create New Banner

Banner Info
Banner Art
Character Art (transparent PNG — shown on right side of banner, like Genshin. Add up to 5 images; they auto-rotate every 4 s.)
⚠️ Requires a one-time SQL migration in Supabase SQL Editor:
ALTER TABLE banners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS char_image_1 text DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE banners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS char_image_2 text DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE banners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS char_image_3 text DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE banners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS char_image_4 text DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE banners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS char_image_5 text DEFAULT '';
Featured Cards (1–5 rate-up cards shown prominently)
Card Pool Filter (leave all blank = all cards. Pick series tags to restrict this banner's pool.)

🏮 All Banners
